node.statement: NORM BOUND (drop the trailing j). ||(Phi-I)Cj|| <= ||(Phi-I)C||. Derivation: by operator-norm submultiplicativity (GT-opnorm-submult: ||uw||<=||u||*||w||) applied with u=(Phi-I)C and w=j, ||(Phi-I)Cj|| = ||((Phi-I)C) j|| <= ||(Phi-I)C|| * ||j||_op; by GT-hyp (H1), ||j||_op=1, so ||(Phi-I)Cj|| <= ||(Phi-I)C|| * 1 = ||(Phi-I)C||. Uses GT-opnorm-submult, GT-hyp.
